description: Italian criminal organization founded in 1994 in Potenza, Basilicata, aiming to become the fifth mafia in southern Italy after Cosa Nostra, Camorra, 'Ndrangheta, and Sacra Corona Unita. It controlled illicit activities in the region but was significantly downsized after all its leaders were arrested by April 1999. Since then, the area's organized crime has been dominated by 'Ndrangheta clans from Rosarno.
